retry_reason: Not a refcount wrapper — the function's failure modes involve VM state errors or memory allocation failures; retrying without changing conditions would likely repeat the same failure.

judge.reason: The function performs extensive VM validation (locking, page table updates, HMM range management, fence waits) with reference-count operations only as one part of broader logic. Not primarily a refcount wrapper.
